inputs.label: Total Renovation Area (sq ft)
inputs.businessContext: Total floor area to be renovated, including all rooms and corridors.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total floor area to be renovated, including all rooms and corridors.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tüm odalar ve koridorlar dahil olmak üzere yenilenecek toplam taban alanı

inputs.label: Scope Complexity
inputs.businessContext: Low: cosmetic only; Medium: structural and MEP changes; High: full gut renovation with new systems.

businessContext_i18n.en: Low: cosmetic only; Medium: structural and MEP changes; High: full gut renovation with new systems.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Düşük: sadece kozmetik; Orta: yapısal ve MEP değişiklikleri; Yüksek: yeni sistemlerle tamamen boşaltma yenilemesi

inputs.label: Material Quality Tier
inputs.businessContext: Economy: budget finishes; Standard: mid-range; Premium: high-end, sustainable materials.

businessContext_i18n.en: Economy: budget finishes; Standard: mid-range; Premium: high-end, sustainable materials.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ekonomi: bütçe kaplamaları; Standart: orta sınıf; Premium: yüksek kaliteli, sürdürülebilir malzemeler

inputs.label: Labor Efficiency Factor
inputs.businessContext: Average labor hours per square foot based on historical data and crew productivity.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average labor hours per square foot based on historical data and crew productivity.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Geçmiş verilere ve ekip verimliliğine dayalı olarak metrekare başına ortalama işçilik saati

inputs.label: Waste Factor (%)
inputs.businessContext: Expected material waste percentage due to cutting, errors, and over-ordering.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected material waste percentage due to cutting, errors, and over-ordering.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesim, hatalar ve fazla sipariş nedeniyle beklenen malzeme fire yüzdesi

inputs.label: Contingency (%)
inputs.businessContext: Budget reserve for unforeseen issues (e.g., hidden damage, code upgrades).

businessContext_i18n.en: Budget reserve for unforeseen issues (e.g., hidden damage, code upgrades).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Öngörülemeyen sorunlar (ör. gizli hasar, yönetmelik yükseltmeleri) için bütçe rezervi

inputs.label: Regional Cost Index
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier for local labor and material cost variations (1.0 = national average).

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier for local labor and material cost variations (1.0 = national average).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yerel işçilik ve malzeme maliyeti farklılıkları için çarpan (1,0 = ulusal ortalama)

inputs.label: Sustainability Target
inputs.businessContext: If pursuing certification, additional costs for documentation, commissioning, and materials.

businessContext_i18n.en: If pursuing certification, additional costs for documentation, commissioning, and materials.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sertifikasyon hedefleniyorsa, dokümantasyon, devreye alma ve malzemeler için ek maliyetler

rules.message: Combined waste and contingency exceeds 40% – review project risk assumptions.
High complexity scope requires at least 0.1 hours/sq ft labor efficiency.
Sustainability certification typically requires at least standard material quality.

thresholds.message: Projected cost exceeds 120% of baseline – consider scope reduction or value engineering.
Waste factor above 20% indicates potential process inefficiencies – apply Lean principles.
Labor efficiency factor > 0.3 hours/sq ft – investigate crew training or workflow bottlenecks.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
